live_message: Jordan Mitchell is on a call right now. The agent is qualifying him — first-time trial, lost 20 lbs last year, wants to add muscle.
live_message_es: Jordan Mitchell está en una llamada ahora mismo. El agente lo está calificando — primera sesión de prueba, bajó 20 libras el año pasado, ahora quiere ganar músculo.

calls.name: Jordan Mitchell
calls.summary: Currently on call — trial session inquiry

transcript.text: Iron Peak Athletic, how can I help?
Hey, I saw your ad. I want to try a personal training session.
Awesome — we offer a free 45-minute trial session. May I get your name?
Jordan Mitchell.
Nice to meet you, Jordan. What are you working toward right now?
I lost about twenty pounds last year doing cardio. Now I want to put on real muscle.
Strong starting point. I'd pair you with Coach Marcus — he runs our hypertrophy track. Saturday 8:00 AM trial works, or Tuesday 6:30 PM if evenings are better. Which?

calls.summary_long: Jordan Mitchell calling about free trial PT session. Lost ~20 lbs in past year via cardio, now wants to add muscle (hypertrophy goal). Routed to Coach Marcus (hypertrophy specialist). Offered Saturday 8:00 AM or Tuesday 6:30 PM. Call in progress.

calls.name: Ashley Vega
calls.summary: Booked Saturday 8:00 AM — free trial PT session

transcript.text: Iron Peak Athletic.
Hi, my friend trains there and said you do free trial sessions?
We do. Free 45-minute session, no card needed. May I get your name?
Ashley Vega.
Great, Ashley. Any injuries or movements I should flag for the coach?
My right knee is a little iffy. Old soccer thing.
Noted. I'll put you with Coach Dana — she's our movement-screen specialist. Saturday 8:00 AM open?
Yes.
Booked. Saturday 8:00 AM, Coach Dana, free trial. Wear sneakers and bring water. Door code in the confirmation text.

calls.summary_long: Ashley Vega — friend referral, booked Saturday 8:00 AM free trial. Disclosed right knee history (soccer). Routed to Coach Dana (movement screen specialist). Pre-arrival reminders SMS'd including door code.

calls.name: Tyler Hendricks
calls.summary: Booked Thursday 6:00 AM — group strength assessment

calls.name: Anonymous caller

transcript.text: Iron Peak Athletic, after-hours line.
Are you guys open Sundays?
We are — 7:00 AM to 1:00 PM. Looking to book something?
Yeah, the free trial.
Sure. Sunday 9:00 AM works — Coach Marcus is on. Mind sharing your name?
I'd rather just leave my number for now. Six one zero, five five five, oh-three-one-four.
Done. Sunday 9:00 AM trial under that number. We'll text you a reminder Saturday.

calls.summary_long: Anonymous after-hours caller (phone number only, no name). Booked Sunday 9:00 AM free trial with Coach Marcus. Privacy respected — number-only booking accepted. SMS reminder Saturday.

calls.name: Carlos Bishop
calls.summary: Booked Monday 6:30 AM — nutrition coaching add-on

calls.name: Anonymous caller
calls.summary: Asked if you have a sauna (no — they passed)

calls.name: Rachel Stark
calls.summary: Booked Wednesday 7:00 PM — PT first session
